name: Mini Crawfish Pies Pst.
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mini pie shells/tarts (8 in box)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet. Add shallots and onion.
2. Add crawfish (or shrimp) and both soups. Cook, stirring frequently.
3. Prepare the mini pie shells according to package instructions.
4. Fill the shells with the mixture.
5. Bake until heated through or the pie shells are done (350°F).
6. Note: This can be made ahead and frozen. Keep in freezer no longer than 2 weeks.
7. Use the other lb. of crawfish for this batch. A store nearby sells bags of "catnip" shrimp for $3.99 per pound.
8. This recipe freezes well.
